patch.comment: Patch release after version normalization to major 3.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

patch.comment: Dummy patch release to republish after npm token incident.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Release a new major version with router state and middleware refinements, updated navigation semantics, and breaking API/doc alignment changes.
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Major release: client-side router with history and hash modes, configurable base path, and per-route middleware chains; named routes with urlFor() and navigateTo(); typed prefix params and nested route groups; programmatic navigation (navigate, back, forward, go) with replace and state options; isActive() for link state; subscribe() for reactive route change observation; link() and linkTo() DOM helpers for anchor creation; debug() for runtime route inspection; global and per-route not-found handler
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
